message:
fix(redactor): redact full base64 secret values incl. /+= bytes (ft-5o6u5)

GENERIC_API_KEY/GENERIC_TOKEN/GENERIC_SECRET regexes captured value
charsets `[a-zA-Z0-9_-]` (and `_-` plus `.`), so OAuth client_secret
and other base64-encoded values containing `/`, `+`, or `=` were
partially redacted: the regex stopped at the first non-charset byte
and the suffix leaked through robot/MCP/audit surfaces.

Repro pre-fix:
  Redactor::new().redact("client_secret=abcd/EFGH+IJKL=MN1234")
  -> "client_secret=[REDACTED]/EFGH+IJKL=MN1234"   // suffix leaked

Fix: extend the value charset to `[a-zA-Z0-9_/+=-]` (token keeps `.`)
on all three generic patterns. The charset still excludes whitespace
and quotes so the match terminates at the value boundary; a trailing
`next_field=plaintext` after a space is preserved.

Adds 5 regression tests in redactor::tests covering generic_secret,
generic_api_key, generic_token, the whitespace-boundary terminator,
and detect() span reporting on a base64 generic_secret value.
